detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use canfd driver.

sect1.title: xcanfd_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XCanfd driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xcanfd_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XCanfd driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in polled mode.
